data.body: Landed on main as Gerrit change 862 (commit 973dcdbcd '5bad: docs(runbook): name prod box instance id + region'; rebar-ticket: 5bad trailer; LLM-Review +1 + Verified +1; reachable from HEAD). infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md now has a 'The box (where prod runs)' section: instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5, region us-east-1 (traced to var.aws_region default + versions.tf backend as source of truth), account 896586841071, and the ssm start-session/send-command connect snippets. The autodeploy self-update note is accurate per autodeploy.sh:92-93 (body auto-updates via BOT_PATHS rsync; only installer/unit-files are re-materialization-excluded; script-only changes hand-deployed because they trigger no rsync). Docs-only.
